6718b97069d84c2738f658fc name: Pay Back I - Where it all began
6718b97069d84c2738f658fc description: Those leeches are all over downtown tarkov, thin the herd....
6718b97069d84c2738f658fc successMessageT: It's done? About damn time. Onto the next part
6718b9709b5e53a98e6513f2 description: Those damn Americans, always sticking their noses in to what they shouldn't, punish them and bring back proof. Then and only then can we start the real purge....
6718b9709b5e53a98e6513f2 successMessageT: It's done? About damn time. Onto the next part
6718c695b884bcd7b8fbe4e7: Kill 20 scavs in the Factory while wearing the Ghost balaclava
6718c695f8c9e020de18c937 description: Damn scavs ambushed me and my platoon mates using some civs to lure us in. All of my platoon dead they left me bleeding out after laughing at us and looting my comrades, its revenge time and I want you to put the fear into everyone in the region. Baba Yaga is here for vengeance! I need you too kill scavs in the factory but you must be wearing a Ghost balaclava, they will then know the ghost has come to punish them.....
6718c695f8c9e020de18c937 successMessageT: It's done? About damn time. Hopefully some witnesses can spread the word that the Ghost is hunting
6718c695efe1a758003371dc: Kill 20 scavs in the Customs Distric while wearing the Ghost balaclava
6718c695baf8881e33dd465a description: Next I want you to kill scavs in the customs district but again you must still be wearing a Ghost balaclava, they will then know the ghost has come to punish them.....
6718c695baf8881e33dd465a successMessageT: It's done? Onto the next task
6718c695456953ea11312707: Kill 20 scavs in the Woods Nature Reserve while wearing the Ghost balaclava
6718c69596a8bb476964307c description: Next I want you to kill scavs in the Woods Nature Reserve, keep that Ghost balaclava on, for in their last moments they need to see the Ghost...
6718c69596a8bb476964307c successMessageT: It's done? Onto the next task
6718c695cab3d959b9395fc0: Kill 20 scavs in the Interchange District while wearing the Ghost balaclava
6718c695c09d53e3019e2258 description: That shopping mall was full of scum and pick pockets even before this area fell to chaos, Now its infested with rats as well, clear it out and keep that Ghost balaclava on..
6718c695c09d53e3019e2258 successMessageT: It's done? Onto the next task
6718c69587ad10878edf5779: Kill 20 scavs in the Streets of Tarkov while wearing the Ghost balaclava
6718c695f6d8888c6c65f020 description: I had friends who lived round there, now there homes are looted, vandalised and spoiled. Clear the scavs out and keep that Ghost balaclava on..
6718c695f6d8888c6c65f020 successMessageT: It's done? Onto the next task
6718c695fd0b11612ccd878e: Kill 20 scavs in the Shoreline District while wearing the Ghost balaclava
6718c695e5da4e727be8a8cb description: Shoreline used to house a lot retired folk with all the cherished memories in their apartments, then came the scavs clear em out and keep that Ghost balaclava on..
6718c695e5da4e727be8a8cb successMessageT: It's done? Onto the next task
6718c69517034c2187b3ea2f: Kill 20 scavs in the Lighthouse District while wearing the Ghost balaclava
6718c6959351620f69ceb764 description: Lighthouse was a pit of a toffee nose idiots before the chaos, not sure if it's worse now but anyway clear out the scavs and keep that Ghost balaclava on..
6718c6959351620f69ceb764 successMessageT: It's done? Onto the next task
6718c9e8329bae2e7648a7a6: Kill 20 scavs at the Reserve Base while wearing the Ghost balaclava
6718c9e8138349c071c13e4b description: I was based at the Reserve base before all this, good memories spoiled by filthy scavs, kill em all and keep that Ghost balaclava on..
6718c9e8138349c071c13e4b successMessageT: It's done? Onto the next task
6718c9e8ece4edab3a3a31ea: Kill 10 Raiders in the Labs while wearing the Ghost balaclava
6718c9e8f5365d301f434070 description: Raiders... I swear I know some of them but they still try and kill me, even worse than scavs, kill em and keep that Ghost balaclava on no one is safe from the Ghost..
6718c9e8f5365d301f434070 successMessageT: It's done? Onto the next task
6718c9e81bb9222b931e5473: Kill 10 Cultists while wearing the Ghost balaclava
6718c9e8210bdd9faa2e2bc8 description: Chaos breeds weirdos these so called Cultists who commit atrocities all over the region need culling, kill em and keep that Ghost balaclava on no one is safe from the Ghost..
6718c9e8210bdd9faa2e2bc8 successMessageT: It's done? Great time to cut the head off the snake
6718cbc9d1e319e14c3bd3ed: Kill Tagilla while wearing the Ghost balaclava
6718c9e817b73ee75434ed5d: Kill Killa while wearing the Ghost balaclava
6718c9e8e9fdb64acfbd8aed: Kill Reshala while wearing the Ghost balaclava
68ff65a5a13830555b0af78f: Kill Shturman while wearing the Ghost balaclava
6718c9e84262a8add8236997: Kill Glukhar while wearing the Ghost balaclava
6718c9e8fafb34f1c377da9d: Kill Sanitar while wearing the Ghost balaclava
6718c9e8d952a8543cdf52c9: Kill Big Pipe while wearing the Ghost balaclava
6718c9e83e0178562814b3d9: Kill Birdeye while wearing the Ghost balaclava
6718c9e85a0d1e122abaaaa1: Kill Knight while wearing the Ghost balaclava
6718cbc9956b4a43bc0f3266: Kill Kollontay while wearing the Ghost balaclava
6718cbc9a5658d5256ded8ac: Kill Kaban while wearing the Ghost balaclava
68ff66ad70c4a9ce18131814: Kill Partisan while wearing the Ghost balaclava
6718c9e8dcd08967a6aa6961 name: Pay Back XIII - Head of the snake
6718c9e8dcd08967a6aa6961 description: Tagilla, Killa, Reshala, Shturman, Glukhar, Sanitar, Big Pipe, Birdeye, Knight, Kollontay, Kaban and Partisan. Leaders born out from this mess, Cut them down! Baba Yaga has come for them....
6718c9e8dcd08967a6aa6961 successMessageT: It's done? About damn time. I Hope they learnt their lession. Onto the next area!
6718cbc90a1186c8b8f7b5dc name: Pay Back XIV - The Ghost Retires
6718cbc90a1186c8b8f7b5dc description: Baba Yaga must sleep now till the evils of Humanity rise again
6718cbc90a1186c8b8f7b5dc successMessageT: Thank you helping me avenge my fallen comrades and cleaning up the region. The people of tarkov owe you a very large debt, if we ever get to live here again.....
67e179c31d48ae42bb0af275 description: To help you on this path of revenge your enacting for me, you need to learn some skills. First off Grenades
67e179c31d48ae42bb0af275 startedMessageT: Theres a knack to throwing grenades and making sure they don't bounce back to your feet, it's all in wrist. Well go get some practice and frag whoever you can find....
67e179c341a16bdd1fc39071: Get 15 Kills with explosive hand Grenades
67e179c3eff5c977ddd9f6bb description: To help you on this path of revenge your enacting for me, you need to learn some skills. Revolvers.
67e179c3eff5c977ddd9f6bb startedMessageT: A good old revolver will never let you down, mostly. Downside is the reload time, but double points for the cool factor.
67e179c90d92884b7213dcd4 description: To help you on this path of revenge your enacting for me, you need to learn some skills. Pistols.
67e179c90d92884b7213dcd4 startedMessageT: Highly customisable, varied calibers. Any pistol is handy to have at arms reach and will likely save your life or make whoever you aiming at madder..
67e179c90d92884b7213dcd4 successMessageT: A sidearm is always handy for those click moments.
67e179c90968411e8f602ec5 description: To help you on this path of revenge your enacting for me, you need to learn some skills. Shotguns
67e179c90968411e8f602ec5 startedMessageT: So many different ammo types, the close combat king nothing like a close up buckshot in the chest or face.
67e179c90968411e8f602ec5 successMessageT: Versatile and powerful, always handy for close encounters.
67e6bf5f64e1ae8163b36930 description: To help you on this path of revenge your enacting for me, you need to learn some skills. SMGs
67e6bf5f64e1ae8163b36930 startedMessageT: Best in controlled bursts, but the option to unload a full mag in seconds is very handy.
67e6bf5f64e1ae8163b36930 successMessageT: Handy for many situations, short to medium ranges.
67e6bf5f766b059688490eb5 description: To help you on this path of revenge your enacting for me, you need to learn some skills. Assault Carbine
67e6bf5f766b059688490eb5 startedMessageT: Typically semi auto with a few exceptions also typically smaller and lighter than there rifle counterpart. But not always the case.
67e6bf5f766b059688490eb5 successMessageT: Easier to handle, useful for any range of engagement.
67e6bf5fde3db66c77d3265d description: To help you on this path of revenge your enacting for me, you need to learn some skills. Assault Rifle
67e6bf5fde3db66c77d3265d startedMessageT: From the versatile AK-47 to the SIG Spear, Assault rifles are the core of any armed force. With a wide variety of calibers.
67e6bf5fde3db66c77d3265d successMessageT: Some can be used as DMR for the range and switch to full auto for CQB.
67e6bf5f2117269e9358f5a4 description: To help you on this path of revenge your enacting for me, you need to learn some skills. LMGs
67e6bf5f2117269e9358f5a4 startedMessageT: Guns that made the line Spray and pray, or accuracy through volume of fire. The best portable tools for supression, can be cumbersome for CQB though.
67e6bf5f2117269e9358f5a4 successMessageT: One of my personal favourite types of weapons, go full rambo!
67e6bf62402832ce3b2b6295 description: To help you on this path of revenge your enacting for me, you need to learn some skills. DMRs
67e6bf62402832ce3b2b6295 startedMessageT: Usually heavy, with limited ammo capacity and typically semi auto, providing valuable overwatch for modern military platoons.
67e6bf62402832ce3b2b6295 successMessageT: Everyone loves a DMR, my personal favourite is the G28/HK417.
67e6bf62fe900edc5b20451d description: To help you on this path of revenge your enacting for me, you need to learn some skills. Bolt-Actions
67e6bf62fe900edc5b20451d startedMessageT: The kings of precision ranged shots, when you absolutely need to vaporise someones face from 2 miles away.
67e6bf62fe900edc5b20451d successMessageT: Gotta be the M700 or SV-98 all day long.
67e6bf6285d49739b5723e89: Get 15 Kills with bolt action rifles
69a585a580900a3fe91a9c97 description: Merc get in here and shut the door, I need your help. A few of my old comrades are stuck in the city and they need help, and your going to be that help, take this gear and stash it for them to collect. The drop off zone is in the terragroup car park, at the back theres an old mattress and some ducting next to it. Just don't be seen can't have some scav steal it. Also mark the intersection with a MS2000 where it leads to inner streets area of Tarkov City. There aim is to get to the port facility known as Terminal, apparently they can escape and get back to their families.
69a585a580900a3fe91a9c97 successMessageT: Great start, hopefully that will help to get them out of the city.
69a585a5fd6f69056d354615: Stash 2 AK-74N at the car park
69a585a5afe8c9f19364d092: Stash 2 120 Round 5.45 PS ammo packs at the car park
69a585a5d9b9bdfc33d5dcbe: Stash a Grizzly med pack at the car park
69a585a5354c5ff46fe72de4: Mark the transit to streets location with a MS2000
69a585a5440ec65e8aa8ccfa description: Great start thanks Merc, next I need you to thin the herd and stash some more supplies at the rubbish pile in front of an SUV its near the Stryker, don't forget to mark the next transit to the next destination aswell.
69a585a5440ec65e8aa8ccfa successMessageT: Great hopefully that will help them get out of the city.
69a6a9af1c27e6d37796d0a4: Stash 2 6B12 Front Plate Sets near the SUV
69a6a9af7d75441007ce9a05: Stash 2 Iskra Ration Packs near the SUV
69a6a9af08cd43f274bf5876: Stash 2 Bottles of water near the SUV
69a6a9afd240423cc2d9bb1a: Mark the transit to Interchange location with a MS2000
69a6a9af5f8e85f9344a0e8d description: Same deal as before, Clear the shopping mall out and stash some items for me, theres a huge sign for Ultra outside OLI that spot should be good.
69a6a9af5f8e85f9344a0e8d successMessageT: Great next up Customs warehouse area
69a6a9af4ccded2199a296ce: Stash 2 WARTECH Berkut Backpacks at the ultra sign
69a6a9afd5952406fe744d44: Stash 2 6B47 EMR Helmetsat the ultra sign
69a6a9af2113849d7f77e500: Mark the transit to Customs location with a MS2000
69a6a9af127b2f9178de3b1b description: Theres a dangerous scav boss called Reshala here, he was a problem before this whole mess even started, make sure to eliminate him and his guards, thin the herd a bit and drop off some more gear at the crackhouse bathroom and mark the transit to the Factory.
69a6a9af127b2f9178de3b1b successMessageT: Great next up Factory, get your CQB skills ready
69a6a9b22cf558fba54841b0: Stash the SV-98 at the crackhouse
69a6a9b2715d2d2a04341221: Stash 3 7.62r SNB Ammo Packs at the crackhouse
69a6a9b2391cf3c21b0eae56: Mark the transit to the Factory location with a MS2000
69a6a9b21c25f96812bb007e description: Factory has been a hot bed of firefights since the start, give it a clear out and stash the gear in the showers below the office. Mark the transit to woods and get back to me for the next job.
69a6a9b21c25f96812bb007e startedMessageT: Next up a stroll in the Woods
69a6a9b21c25f96812bb007e successMessageT: Great next up into the nature reserve
69a6a9b225c04de7684ce438: Eliminate 10 Scavs in the Factory day or night
69a6a9b24d9e659857d28fae: Eliminate 5 PMCs in the Factory day or night
69a6a9b2bf25614375b7536c: Stash the 2 Helmets in the showers near the big hole in the floor under the office
69a6a9b278a2746f071e3234: Stash the 2 Ammo packs in the showers near the big hole in the floor under the office.
69a6a9b2e94baf750662d7f0: Mark the transit to the Woods location with a MS2000
69a6a9b2a920eff732800353 description: Quick merc take these meds and get out to woods, I just recieved a garbled message from my comrades but I believe one of them is wounded. Stash these meds outside the factory transit point in woods
69a6a9b2a920eff732800353 successMessageT: Thanks merc you saved a life out there today.
69a6a9b557cc3d768ca60f5a: Stash 2 Calok's near the factory transit exit, theres some crates next to a lorry
69a6a9b56cd43d09d6c61e95: Stash 2 Alu Splint near the factory transit exit, theres some crates next to a lorry
69a6a9b27895c7eb3fa23320: Stash 3 AFAKs near the factory transit exit, theres some crates next to a lorry
69a6a9b549fcc24535da20ba description: Thanks merc, apparently it wasn't as bad as they thought, Dimitri always was a drama queen. Some more gear to stash and they need food too, Don't lose those NVG's there very expensive and if you even think about stealing them I'll hunt you down with dogs, Woof!
69a6a9b549fcc24535da20ba startedMessageT: Clear out the woods so my comrades can travel safely
69a6a9b5d846bdfabfd6f099: Stash 2 GPNVG-18 at the fern behind the shack north of the transit to reserve
69a6a9b59255dd3d1415a96d: Stash 2 Iskra at the fern behind the shack north of the transit to reserve
69a6a9b5b333014c95996ce5: Stash 2 Water at the fern behind the shack north of the transit to reserve
69a6a9b5ee118893702e2a7e: Mark the transit to the Reserve base with a MS2000, theres a tree close to it
69a6a9b5107a1b8008083d19 description: My former home, spent years at that base and so did my comrades, they want to stop off and see if some personal items are still there, all I need you to do is create a distraction before they head in by wiping that scum Glukhar out, kill the looting scum and eliminate your competition, plant 4 TNT on the north side support columns inside the train station and then mark the transit to Lighthouse.
69a6a9b5107a1b8008083d19 startedMessageT: Make my former base a bit safer
69a6a9b5107a1b8008083d19 successMessageT: Next up the scenic lighthouse area

69a8031b4bdbfa3f3702a4de description: Plenty of scum bags here to clear out, Make sure to thin the numbers of all the hostile groups here and mark the tranist to shoreline.
69a8031b4bdbfa3f3702a4de startedMessageT: Let's get this zone cleared out.
69a8031b70d96b1a1b5ab43d: Mark the transit to Shoreline with a MS2000
69a8031b0db3a0ada373e5ff description: Final area at last this is going well, Fresh armour, some vests and food to keep them going. Clear out the trash and get ready to go straight back out

69a8031bbf2c80ca0c8e8cfd description: Some new weapons have been requested, and I've noticed an increase in PMCs in the area, shut them down.
69a8031b9c03833ad6e6270d: Stash 4 RGO Grenades at the building the outside power station in the broken locker
69a8031b4cc6719f91fa9382: Stash an AK-12 at the building outside the power station in the broken locker

69a8031b8eb9235026f9f9b2: Stash 2 120 Round 5.45 PS ammo packs at the building outside the power station in the broken locker
69a8031b32b80398ed075904 description: Sigh, The goons have discovered what we are upto and there heading into the area to wipe them out. This must not happen, remove the Goons from existance! Mark the entrance to terminal as well.
69a8031b32b80398ed075904 successMessageT: Thank you merc, it's been a stretch but my comrades are in Terminal now and hopefully getting of this hell hole. You want out as well? Good luck with that......
